display.purpose: Hero and page titles. Spectral 600, tight tracking.

body.purpose: All running text and UI. Hanken Grotesk, calm and legible on mobile.

label.purpose: Uppercase kickers and eyebrows. Wide 0.22em tracking.

quran.purpose: Arabic naskh via Amiri for Quran and du'a text.

shadows.name: teal
shadows.purpose: Branded glow under a primary button on hover; mobile add-button.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state and drawer transitions.

motion.name: duration-quick
motion.purpose: Hover/color transitions on links, chips, buttons.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The trust-bearing primary action; teal fill, porcelain text, lifts with a branded glow on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: var(--font-hanken, 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif); font-weight: 600; font-size: .94rem; line-height: 1; padding: 11px 20px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: var(--emerald, #12525B); color: var(--cream, #F8F6F1); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(31,41,51,.05), 0 1px 3px rgba(31,41,51,.06); cursor: pointer; transition: all .16s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--emerald-700, #0D424A); box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(18,82,91,.22); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--emerald, #12525B); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: Rare warm CTA; saffron fill with near-black text for AA contrast.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: var(--font-hanken, 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif); font-weight: 600; font-size: .94rem; line-height: 1; padding: 11px 20px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: var(--gold, #C97D3F); color: #2e2205; cursor: pointer; transition: all .16s ease; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { background: var(--gold-700, #A96430); transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Inline filter/selector; white pill at rest, teal fill when active with a saffron icon.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 8px 15px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--white, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong, #DED7C7); font-family: var(--font-hanken, 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: .86rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink-soft, #586471); cursor: pointer; line-height: 1; transition: all .15s; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: var(--emerald-300, #6FA0A8); color: var(--ink, #1F2933); } .ds-chip--active { background: var(--emerald, #12525B); color: var(--cream, #F8F6F1); border-color: var(--emerald, #12525B); }

components.name: MUIS Certified Badge
components.description: The top, official tier of the graduated trust system: solid teal, unmistakable.
components.html: MUIS Certified
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 4px 10px 4px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: var(--font-hanken, 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: .74rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-badge--muis { background: var(--emerald, #12525B); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(18,82,91,.25); }

components.name: Muslim-Owned Badge
components.description: Verified-adjacent tier: soft teal fill + teal text, clearly distinct from the certified tier.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 4px 10px 4px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: var(--font-hanken, 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: .74rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge--owned { background: var(--emerald-50, #EDF4F4); color: var(--emerald, #12525B); border: 1px solid var(--emerald-300, #6FA0A8); }

components.name: Listing Card
components.description: The core directory unit; flat on porcelain at rest, lifts on hover via shadow + translate.
components.html:
Warong Nasi Pariaman

Padang · North Bridge Road
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--white, #fff); border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--line, #ECE7DB); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(31,41,51,.05), 0 1px 3px rgba(31,41,51,.06); overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow .2s, transform .2s, border-color .2s; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(31,41,51,.12), 0 6px 14px rgba(31,41,51,.06); transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: var(--line-strong, #DED7C7); } .ds-card-media { aspect-ratio: 16/10; background: linear-gradient(140deg, var(--cream-200, #F0EDE4), var(--emerald-50, #EDF4F4)); } .ds-card-body { padding: 14px 15px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-card-name { margin: 0; font-family: var(--font-spectral, 'Spectral', Georgia, serif); font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.12rem; letter-spacing: -.01em; color: var(--ink, #1F2933); } .ds-card-meta { margin: 0; font-family: var(--font-hanken, 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: .82rem; color: var(--ink-faint, #626C78); font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview: Humble Halal reads like a calm, editorial almanac for the Singapore Muslim community — a place whose whole job is to tell you the truth about halal status and let you decide with confidence. It is built on a warm porcelain ground, a grounded deep teal that carries trust, and a single saffron accent used sparingly for warmth and wayfinding. Headlines are Spectral serif over quiet Hanken Grotesk body text; a subtle girih lattice appears as texture, never ornament. The world was deliberately chosen (July 2026 revamp) to be distinct from generic AI-generated SaaS mockups.
keyCharacteristics: Warm porcelain ground, never clinical white; every neutral is tinted, never pure gray/black.
Deep teal carries trust; saffron is a rare accent, not a second brand color.
Editorial serif (Spectral) for voice; grotesk (Hanken) for calm utility; Amiri for Arabic.
Honest, graduated trust badges are the signature component.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: No pure black, white, or gray touches the UI. Text is tinted slate, backgrounds are porcelain, shadows are teal-tinted rgba.

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: Saffron appears on ≤10% of any screen — an underline, a badge, a star, a single CTA. Its scarcity is the point.

rules.name: The Serif-Headline Rule
rules.body: Headlines (h1–h4) are always Spectral 600 with -0.01em tracking. Body and UI are always Hanken.

rules.name: The Lift-On-Intent Rule
rules.body: Cards sit flat at rest and rise to the lg shadow with a -2px translate only on hover/focus. Motion and shadow appear together, as feedback.

dos: Do ground every surface on porcelain (#F8F6F1) and keep all neutrals tinted.
Do reserve saffron for a single accent per view; teal carries trust and structure.
Do set headlines in Spectral 600 (-0.01em) and body/UI in Hanken.
Do keep the graduated badge hierarchy visually honest: MUIS Certified is solid and singular; self-declared tiers read as muted and clearly not-official.
Do resolve brand color from the CSS custom properties in styles/styles.css and keep AA contrast.
Do use the --fs-* type tokens and --r-* radius tokens instead of raw rem/px literals; extend the token set intentionally rather than hand-typing a new value.
donts: Don't reintroduce the generic AI-SaaS look the July 2026 revamp rejected: no Inter/system default headlines, no purple/blue gradients, no pure-white/pure-gray flatness.
Don't promote saffron into a co-primary or use bounce/elastic easing.
Don't hard-code brand hex values in new code, and don't trust the token names: --emerald holds teal (#12525B), --gold holds saffron.
Don't style a self-declared listing to look certified, or invent a rating/verdict.
